changeSet.author: mikael
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dtime.users (id, password, firstname, lastname, email, status, userrole, createdatetime, updatedatetime, createdby, updatedby) VALUES (1, '$2b$12$8UVIVfZgA/8.0EBAtAvp3eM5moNff3rq.BoUPohf6C.lQRUjDnB9e', 'D', 'Time', 'admin@dtime.se','ACTIVE', 'ADMIN', NOW(), NOW(), 1, 1)
